title: selaginella membranacea
intro: Selaginella membranacea, also known as the 'Tiger's Jaw', is a species of resurrection fern that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria, making it a potential candidate for the development of new antibiotics. The health benefits of Selaginella membranacea include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
